examples.title: Generate Combinations with Repetition
examples.description: Algorithm to list all r-length combinations from n elements with repetition
examples.code:
FUNCTION generate_combos(elements, r):
    IF r == 0:
        RETURN [[]]
    ELSE:
        FOR i FROM 0 TO len(elements)-1:
            FOR combo IN generate_combos(elements[i:], r-1):
                YIELD [elements[i]] + combo
examples.explanation: Uses recursion with element window shrinking to maintain order and allow repetition
